title: Here are the dates for the Patriots’ offseason workout schedule
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: The New England Patriots begin their offseason workout program with phase one limited to conditioning on April 20.
Organized team activities for the Patriots occur May 27, May 29, June 1-2, June 4, June 8-9, and June 11.
The Patriots will hold a mandatory minicamp from June 15-17 before returning for training camp in July.

title: Patriots double up on edge rushers in latest ESPN mock draft
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: The Patriots are projected to draft edge rushers Cashius Howell and Gabe Jacas in the first two rounds.
Cashius Howell is known for his speed and pressure generation, compared to NFL's Will McDonald IV.
Gabe Jacas is described as a strong run defender, drawing comparisons to Patriots’ Matthew Judon.

title: For a struggling Red Sox team, Friday’s opener at Fenway Park provided a fresh start
author: Trevor Hass
bullets: Red Sox defeated the San Diego Padres 5-2 at Fenway Park's 2026 home opener, ending a 1-5 start.
Sonny Gray pitched six innings and Willson Contreras hit a 423-foot home run, leading to the victory.
Caleb Durbin broke out of a slump with an RBI single, helping energize the Fenway Park crowd.

title: North Andover police working to get body cameras after Kelsey Fitzsimmons shooting
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: North Andover is seeking grant funding to implement a body-worn camera program for police officers.
Kelsey Fitzsimmons was acquitted of assault after a shooting incident, highlighting the department's lack of body cameras.
Since 2021, Massachusetts has awarded nearly $13 million for local police body camera programs.

title: Xander Bogaerts talks Roman Anthony, pressure from fans in his return to Fenway Park
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Xander Bogaerts returned to Fenway Park as a Padres player, receiving a standing ovation from Red Sox fans.
Bogaerts compared the pressure in Boston to that in San Diego, noting heightened expectations in both cities.
Bogaerts mentioned Red Sox outfielder Roman Anthony as a promising player facing high expectations in Boston.

title: Step into Boston’s past this season
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Boston's Freedom Trail spans 2.5 miles and connects 16 historical sites, attracting over 4 million visitors annually.
Six Flags New England will debut the Quantum Accelerator, a dual-launch straddle coaster, opening April 17 to the public.
Restaurant Week Portsmouth & Seacoast in New Hampshire runs April 9-18, with prix fixe menus ranging from $32 to $52.

title: Singer Vanessa Carlton’s noise complaint against R.I. neighbor ends up before state Supreme Court
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Vanessa Carlton and husband John McCauley allege noise harassment from neighbors in Warwick, Rhode Island.
A 2024 injunction limits noise levels from the neighboring property but is being appealed by property owners.
The Rhode Island Supreme Court reviewed the case, with no decision made on the appeal concerning noise levels.

title: Delta is adding winter service between Boston and Rome in 2027
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Delta Air Lines will start winter flights between Boston and Rome in January 2027.
The service will operate four times a week until March, when daily flights resume.
Fares for the new 2027 Boston-Rome flights go on sale starting April 4, 2026.

title: He’s running his second Boston Marathon for Brigham and Women’s Hospital
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Joe Greeley, 30, from Charlestown, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for Brigham and Women's Hospital.
Greeley first ran the Boston Marathon in 2024 for the Stepping Strong charity and was inspired to return.
He experienced fear of missing out in 2025, motivating his decision to participate again for the charity.

title: ‘Real Housewives of Rhode Island’: Everything that happened in Episode 1
author: Lauren Daley
bullets: 'Real Housewives of Rhode Island' premieres with a 90-minute pilot focusing on local drama and cast introductions.
Key storylines include wedding pressure for Alicia Carmody and throuple relationship challenges for Kelsey Swanson.
Rosie Woods DiMare and Jo-Ellen Tiberi's feud escalates during a picnic, leading to a tense Fourth of July party.
